text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So everyone, did all our feelings get<n>across to
you?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We heard your voices too. We heard<n>you cheering
us on.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why of course. If not for that, there<n>would be little
meaning in us having<n>this concert at all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We'll never forget what we shared<n>here today, or
your kind words of<n>support.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We will always run alongside you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunderous applause and cheers fill<n>the arena.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together with their fans, the girls sing<n>song after
song...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Songs from the heart.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't believe it. You can hear the<n>cheers all the
way from here.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer. For<n>sticking with me
through thick and<n>thin.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
For giving me the opportunity to build<n>this... this
beautiful concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzz, bzz!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! Who's texting right in the<n>middle of...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: It's from her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert brings<n>Umamusume and their
fans together<n>in one impassioned dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But as with any dream, morning<n>always comes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Dance Instructor
text_block_list.text: Well, that's all for today's lesson!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, uh, Falcon. If you're free,<n>wanna go over the
choreography<n>from earlier together?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The choreography from earlier? You<n>mean...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You know... for the backup dancers.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...I'm good. If we're pretending it's<n>the real thing,
then I definitely<n>shouldn't be smiling. I mean, this
choreo is for backup dancers.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I dunno about you, but I don't want to<n>get too
used to this dance. If I can get<n>through it with a
smile, it means I'll<n>never reach center stage.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ever since performing in the Grand<n>Concert, I
can't get the fans' smiles<n>out of my head.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So I've made up my mind—I want to<n>dance with a
smile no matter where I<n>am on stage.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Because, well... I realized I get more<n>motivated that
way. Like, "Next time, I<n>want to win for them," you
know?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Okay then, let's do this! But get<n>ready,
'cause I don't accept<n>half-hearted smiles!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone. It's been a while.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hello! How's planning for next<n>year's Grand
Concert going?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Swimmingly, thanks to cooperation<n>from the folks
at URA. Actually, I came<n>here to talk to you all
about that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So, for our next publicity poster, I was<n>thinking of
using this group photo...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Group photo?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! From the Grand Concert!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...It's wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
It truly is. The person who took it, she<n>said to me
with a smile...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
"This shot lit a fire in me. It made me<n>want to shine
just as brightly as they<n>do..."

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
"...And it made me want to cheer for<n>them with all
my heart."

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want to light that same fire in all the<n>new runners
soon to debut, and all<n>the people soon to become
new fans.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Would you let me pass her emotions<n>on with this
photo?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello's plea is answered<n>across the board
with nods—and<n>smiles.
